name: market-snapshot
description: Cross-rail market snapshot: crypto spot prices via Alchemy (Circle nanopayment, DIRECT) + token price via Allium (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router). One run exercises both payment rails.

symbols.description: Comma-separated crypto symbols for Alchemy spot prices, e.g. ETH,BTC,USDC

tokenChain.description: Chain for the Allium token-price lookup

tokenAddress.description: Token contract address for the Allium price (default: USDC on Ethereum)

steps.label: spot price — Alchemy (Circle nanopayment / Gateway-batched, DIRECT)
token price — Allium (MPP / tempo-native, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
